node.text: Caroline values having people around her who accept and support her.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "support negative experience") on Session 12 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Caroline had a great time with the whole gang at the Pride fest last year and values supportive friends.

node.text: Caroline found a vibrant rainbow sidewalk during Pride Month, which reminded her of love and acceptance.
